title: CS Student | DevOps & Backend
bio: 4th semester Computer Science student focused on DevOps and backend development. I run a cloud-native platform with four projects in production — Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Nginx and DigitalOcean.
project_portfolio: Multi-project platform with Nginx reverse proxy, CI/CD pipeline visualization and infrastructure dashboard.
project_raidfines: WoW raid fine system with OAuth2 login via Battle.net and GitHub. Incl. custom Lua addon.
project_webcrawler: Configurable crawler with D3.js network visualization and AI content analysis.
project_beskyttelsesrum: Interactive map of Danish shelters with capacity reports.
partner_desc: We are two classmates applying for an internship at Tech Chapter together.
exit_text: Leaving already? Check out what I've built!
